books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Kate Chopin
books.summary: A collection of Kate Chopin’s short stories, ordered by date of writing.

books.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
books.author: Jules Verne
books.summary: Prompted by a mysterious Icelandic manuscript, a professor and his nephew, with the aid of a local guide, adventure to the center of the earth through the crater of a dormant volcano.

books.title: The Autobiography of John Stuart Mill
books.author: John Stuart Mill
books.summary: The autobiography of English philosopher John Stuart Mill.

books.title: Queen Victoria
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: A sardonic and generally unflattering biography of Victoria Alexandrina, Queen of England.

books.title: The Mystery of Cabin Island
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.summary: A group of amateur detectives unravel the mystery of a missing stamps collection.

books.title: My Four Weeks in France
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A sports columnist and humorist travels to France as a war correspondent during World War I and recounts his experiences on the assignment.

books.title: Much Ado About Nothing
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: One couple is tricked into falling in love, and another couple is tricked into falling out of love.

books.title: The Sundering Flood
books.author: William Morris
books.summary: Separated from his true love by an uncrossable river, a young man ventures into the world hoping to find a path that will bring them together.

books.title: Le Morte d’Arthur
books.author: Thomas Malory
books.summary: A late Middle Ages version of the story of King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Frank Belknap Long
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Frank Belknap Long, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: Running a Thousand Miles for Freedom
books.author: William Craft
books.summary: The authors escape from slavery by posing as a slaveowner and his slave.

books.title: Tracks in the Snow
books.author: Godfrey R. Benson
books.summary: A rector investigates the mystery behind a strange letter that may be connected to his friend’s murder.

books.title: The City of God
books.author: Augustine of Hippo
books.summary: Bishop Augustine of Hippo provides a defense of the Christian faith against its pagan critics, as well as explaining God’s work and purposes in world history, from beginning to end.

books.title: What Is Art?
books.author: Leo Tolstoy
books.summary: Leo Tolstoy outlines his philosophy of aesthetics.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: A collection of William Shakespeare’s poems and sonnets.

books.title: The Surprising Adventures of Baron Munchausen
books.author: Rudolph Erich Raspe
books.summary: The legendary Baron Munchausen’s tall tales of wonder and adventure.

books.title: The Invisible Man
books.author: H. G. Wells
books.summary: A scientist named Griffin creates a serum to render himself invisible and subsequently descends into madness.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Cordwainer Smith
books.summary: A collection of short stories by Cordwainer Smith ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Story of My Experiments with Truth
books.author: Mahatma Gandhi
books.summary: Gandhi relates his life experiences from his birth in Gujarat in 1869 through the Indian National Congress of 1915.

books.title: Jack Keefe Stories
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A boastful, nearly illiterate major league pitcher writes a series of letters home detailing the goings-on in his life and career.
